title: Mail item with integromat
excerpt: is it possible to retrieve the email address of an element with integromat?

posts.author: YannD (Yann Dehuy)
posts.cookedHtml: is it possible to retrieve the email address of an element with integromat?

posts.author: dipro (Dipro Bhowmik)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @YannD!

Every board has a “backup” email address in the form board-{boardId}-[RandomKey}@{slug}.monday.com.

Items also have this kind of email, in the format pulse-{boardId}-[RandomKey}@{slug}.monday.com

For example: board-12345-ABCDEFGHIJKL@myteam.monday.com

So, if you know the board ID or item ID of an element, and you know the random key (which you can get from your user profile) you can derive this backup email in Integromat.

For more specifics on this, check out the fourth section of this article: Can I send an email to monday.com?

posts.author: YannD (Yann Dehuy)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks for the information, it works perfectly

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
